nodes.label: Tests for SIGHUP protection and stdout mirroring in ``mangaba update``.  Covers
When the terminal disconnects, original.write raises BrokenPipeError.          T
OSError (EIO) and ValueError (closed file) should also be absorbed.
Even if the log file write raises, the original write must still happen.
In gateway mode the process is already detached — don't touch stdio or signals.
SIGHUP should be set to SIG_IGN so SSH disconnect doesn't kill the update.
If get_mangaba_home() raises, stdio must be left untouched but SIGHUP still hand
When install failed (state['installed']=False) finalize should not         touch
